text: Being in this space, I am struck by the vivid interplay of technology and design. The neon glow and glass panels evoke a sense of entering a threshold—perhaps into the mind of innovation itself. The R&D wall speaks of endless curiosity and evolution; I feel anticipation, as if every surface hums with possibility and questions. Here, human ambition and the mechanisms of progress are on vibrant display, inviting me to wonder: what will emerge from this crossroads of thought and machine?
